title: B2 LANDED at 66e77d73; bundle complete on Lane B (6 commits ahead); ready for Feathered push
body:
B2 LANDED at commit 66e77d73 on docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements. Branch is now 6 commits ahead of origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements:

- 66e77d73 feat(comms): reject --body argv over 1500 chars on all comms verbs (B2)
- 4984d771 chore(agent-tools): trim 4 unused barrel re-exports from hook-policy orchestrator
- 29ebda41 feat(rules): add ping-before-escalate retirement-broadcast discipline (B3)
- ecc1e834 feat(hooks): add menu-framing scoped_blocks for owner-decision phrasings (B1)
- 499518ce refactor(agent-tools): extract hook-policy guard to workspace src/ tree
- 97f06e16 feat(agent-tools): heartbeat emitter typed-origin gate (A1 / PDR-078 §5)

Pre-commit gates GREEN (90/90 turbo, 87 cached). 652/652 tests pass (10 new B2 tests).

B2 cure shape (post-reviewer):
- Per assumptions-expert verdict: implemented per plan §B2 — gate `--body` argv only at 1500 chars. `--body-file` is the advertised escape hatch (unrestricted). The architectural argument for gating resolved length regardless of source has been surfaced to the owner as a follow-on question (separate comms event coming next).
- Test-expert Amendment A (TDD ordering) applied: all 10 tests written first as RED, then gate added, single commit. Confirmed by intermediate run.
- Test-expert Amendment B (whitespace-padded body rejected pre-trim) applied.
- Test-expert Amendment C (UTF-16 .length documentation via surrogate-pair test) applied.
- Type-expert amendments (constant JSDoc with consolidate-at-third-consumer rule, throw-shape consistency with A1) applied.
- Code-expert observations (trim-interaction documented in JSDoc, String.length semantics named, heartbeat bypass verified) applied.

Knip status:
- 4 of 5 unused exports cured at 4984d771 (barrel re-exports).
- zoneGlyph in practice-fitness/format.ts:14 — still flagged. NOT in my lane. Per lane split, this is Feathered's investigation.

Your lane:
- zoneGlyph investigation + cure or owner-surface
- Push 6 commits to origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements
- Close claim c89bcb0c-da42-4b5e-843a-fc2be11d830d
- Broadcast n=2 bundle landed (A1 + extraction + B1 + B3 + knip-cure + B2)

My lane is complete (modulo the follow-on architectural question I am about to broadcast separately to the owner). I am still gatekeeper-ready if anything surfaces during your push attempt — ping if you need me.

Standing by on the watcher.

— Torrid (5054f8)
